topStories.description: The US-Israeli offensive has so far damaged over 600 schools, and left more than 1,000 students and teachers killed or injured, Iran said.

topStories.description: After centre's claim that cut in excise duty on petrol and diesel will provide relief to consumers, Congress argues that this move benefits only oil companies

topStories.title: 'Will Review Rates Every 15 Days': Centre After Petrol, Diesel Excise Cut
topStories.description: The war and the blockade sent prices of global benchmark Brent crude skyrocketing from US$68 per barrel on Feb 28 (before the fighting began) to past the US$100 red line on March 7.

topStories.description: The late-night vote is a step towards bringing the 40-day partial shutdown - and long security lines at US airports - to an end.

topStories.description: One month since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, Tehran residents tell the BBC their lives have been devastated.

topStories.description: The agreement would fund DHS components such as the Transportation Security Administration and US Coast Guard, the statement said.

dailyNews.title: Battleground Dem candidate linked public displays of faith to political violence in 2023 speech
dailyNews.description: Iowa Democratic candidate Sarah Trone Garriott said "this is not a Christian nation" in a 2023 speech and voiced discomfort over public Christian displays.

dailyNews.title: Restaurants may be quietly inflating your tip — and diners are starting to notice
dailyNews.description: Restaurant owners say tips should be calculated on pre-tax totals, warning that post-tax tipping inflates bills and erodes customer trust. A recent dining controversy stirred debate.

dailyNews.title: Cheryl Hines fires back at Chelsea Handler in 'toxic' mansion dispute, says she's trying to stay relevant
dailyNews.description: Cheryl Hines dismisses Chelsea Handler's claims of a selling her a "toxic" $6 million home, saying Handler seeks attention and relevance with the "silly" story.

dailyNews.title: China's American Mao: Inside Singham’s blueprint to ‘wage war' for a 'new world order'
dailyNews.description: A Fox News Digital investigation uncovers how Neville Roy Singham built an "International Revolutionary Front" of 2,000 organizations advancing Mao-inspired strategy of activism, media and messaging aligned with China’s vision for a "new world order."

dailyNews.title: Fox News Poll: Fans say paywalled sports are out of bounds
dailyNews.description: A new Fox News Poll finds 72% of sports fans say major sporting events should be required to stay on free broadcast TV, not behind streaming paywalls.

dailyNews.title: Savannah Guthrie opens up about return to TV, NBC announces comeback date
dailyNews.description: “Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie has been away from NBC News’ flagship morning show since her mother, Nancy, went missing on Feb. 1.

dailyNews.title: Hollywood union praises Trump's AI policy as 'protections for human creativity'
dailyNews.description: SAG-AFTRA supported the Trump administration's national AI policy framework, calling for strong protections for members' performances and likenesses from misuse.

dailyNews.title: Senate passes overnight bill to fund most of Homeland Security as fight nears end and more top headlines
dailyNews.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.

dailyNews.title: Phillies player Alec Bohm sues parents for allegedly 'siphoning' his money
dailyNews.description: Philadelphia Phillies player Alec Bohm is suing his parents for at least $3 million, alleging they froze him out of four accounts and converted his money for personal use.

dailyNews.title: Department of Education employees are working every day to put themselves 'out of a job,' but why?
dailyNews.description: The Department of Education reached its 10th interagency agreement, moving student lending to Treasury. Undersecretary Nicholas Kent says the goal is to close the department entirely.

dailyNews.title: Cam Newton views adding 18th regular-season game as 'good business,' questions how preseason games will work
dailyNews.description: Cam Newton said an NFL 18th regular-season game would further dilute preseason, calling the league's expansion push simply "good business" for the sport.

dailyNews.title: Senate approves most DHS funding, hours after Trump promised to restart TSA pay
dailyNews.description: The Senate agreed early Friday to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security in an effort to end a standoff in Congress that led to massive lines at many airports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he'll order DHS to start paying TSA officers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he will sign an executive order to restart pay for TSA officers, who have gone more than a month without a full paycheck.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's 2026 State of the Union Address and the Democratic response
dailyNews.description: President Trump delivers the longest State of the Union address in recent history, followed by the Democratic response from Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff floats Iran peace plan as Trump extends pause on energy plant strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump has extended a pause on striking Iranian energy infrastructure until April 6.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Pentagon from labeling Anthropic AI a "supply chain risk"
dailyNews.description: A judge has blocked the Trump administration from labeling Anthropic a supply chain risk and cutting off all federal work with the artificial intelligence firm, an early win for Anthropic in its bitter feud with the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's granting Iran's request to extend pause on energy site strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced the extension of the pause "per Iranian government request."

dailyNews.title: Ambitious, authoritarian and talking to Trump? The hard-liners rising in Iran
dailyNews.description: The Israeli military has systematically killed Iran’s top leaders, so when President Donald Trump said this week that talks are being held with Iran, the biggest question was: Who exactly is the U.S. talking to

dailyNews.title: Trump's signature to appear on paper currency in a first for a sitting president
dailyNews.description: Dollar bills historically have been signed by the U.S. treasurer and treasury secretary.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Pentagon's Anthropic blacklisting for now
dailyNews.description: A federal judge in California has blocked the Trump administration from designating Anthropic as a supply chain risk to national security and cutting off the AI company’s work with federal agencies

dailyNews.title: Epstein survivors sue Trump administration and Google over release of private information
dailyNews.description: The class action suit seeks at least $1,000 per survivor from the DOJ and a court order for Google to immediately and permanently take down their personal info.

dailyNews.title: Brent oil tops $110 as Trump's Iran deadline extension fails to allay supply fears
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.
